meta.summary: Salmon transcript-level RNA-seq quantification with indexing, selective-alignment quantification, alignment-based quantification, and quantification merging.
meta.description: Salmon transcript-level RNA-seq quantification with indexing, selective-alignment quantification, alignment-based quantification, and quantification merging.

test: test "$(salmon --version)" = 'salmon 1.11.4' && salmon --no-version-check --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'salmon v1.11.4' >/dev/null && salmon --no-version-check --cite 2>&1 | grep -F '10.1038/nmeth.4197' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v salmon) | grep -F 'libstdc++.so' >/dev/null && ! ldd $(command -v salmon) | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null

salmon --no-version-check index --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Creates a salmon index' >/dev/null && salmon --no-version-check quant --help-reads 2>&1 | grep -F 'selective-alignment-based' >/dev/null && salmon --no-version-check quant --help-alignment 2>&1 | grep -F 'alignment-based' >/dev/null && salmon --no-version-check quantmerge --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Merge multiple quantification results' >/dev/null

rm -rf /tmp/taf-salmon-index && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-salmon-index && cd /tmp/taf-salmon-index && printf '>tx1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>tx2
TTTTGGGGCCCCAAAATTTTGGGGCCCCAAAATTTTGGGG
' > transcripts.fa && salmon --no-version-check index -t transcripts.fa -i idx -k 15 -p 1 >/tmp/taf-salmon-index.log 2>&1 && test -s idx/info.json && test -s idx/sshash.bin && grep -F '"num_kmers"' idx/info.json >/dev/null

rm -rf /tmp/taf-salmon-quant && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-salmon-quant && cd /tmp/taf-salmon-quant && printf '>tx1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>tx2
TTTTGGGGCCCCAAAATTTTGGGGCCCCAAAATTTTGGGG
' > transcripts.fa && salmon --no-version-check index -t transcripts.fa -i idx -k 15 -p 1 >/tmp/taf-salmon-quant-index.log 2>&1 && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
@r2
TTTTGGGGCCCCAAAATTTT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
@r3
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && salmon --no-version-check quant -i idx -l A -r reads.fq -o quant -p 1 --minAssignedFrags 1 -q >/tmp/taf-salmon-quant.log 2>&1 && test -s quant/quant.sf && grep -F 'Name' quant/quant.sf >/dev/null && grep -F 'tx1' quant/quant.sf >/dev/null && grep -F 'tx2' quant/quant.sf >/dev/null

rm -rf /tmp/taf-salmon-merge && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-salmon-merge/q1 /tmp/taf-salmon-merge/q2 && cd /tmp/taf-salmon-merge && printf 'Name	Length	EffectiveLength	TPM	NumReads
tx1	40	2.432	100.0	2.0
tx2	40	2.432	0.0	0.0
' > q1/quant.sf && printf 'Name	Length	EffectiveLength	TPM	NumReads
tx1	40	2.432	10.0	1.0
tx2	40	2.432	90.0	9.0
' > q2/quant.sf && salmon --no-version-check quantmerge --quants q1 q2 --names s1 s2 --column TPM -o merged.tsv >/tmp/taf-salmon-merge.log 2>&1 && grep -F 'Name' merged.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'tx2' merged.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F '90' merged.tsv >/dev/null
